if-nwc: nova-ts.service template backported to match live unit (commit f6f17ffb on nv); nova-ts and nova-discord-svc disabled on homelab; Doppler creds removed from .env.production. Live root cause was Apr 23 reinstall regressing bare node ExecStart + V8 internal OOM at 4G never tripping 6G cgroup. Fixes already deployed live; this just protects against next install-ts.sh overwrite. if-0up: Tier 1+2 observability stack (systemd-oomd, smartd, prometheus-node-exporter, Vector → Better Stack) chezmoi-managed via scripts/homelab/harden.sh (commit f4fdfdb on if). Dashboard 999906 with 7 charts + 6 alerts armed. Validated end-to-end — pipeline captured a real nova-ts coredump (PID 8199, 4G memory peak) within seconds of starting.
